scripts.server:daemon:start: sh -c 'nohup node scripts/server-supervisor.mjs > /tmp/nexus-labs-server-supervisor.log 2>&1 & echo $! > /tmp/nexus-labs-server-supervisor.pid && echo Server supervisor started with PID $(cat /tmp/nexus-labs-server-supervisor.pid)'
scripts.server:daemon:ensure: sh -c 'if [ -f /tmp/nexus-labs-server-supervisor.pid ] && kill -0 $(cat /tmp/nexus-labs-server-supervisor.pid) 2>/dev/null; then echo Server supervisor already running; else npm run server:daemon:start; fi'
scripts.server:daemon:stop: sh -c 'if [ -f /tmp/nexus-labs-server-supervisor.pid ]; then kill $(cat /tmp/nexus-labs-server-supervisor.pid) 2>/dev/null || true; rm -f /tmp/nexus-labs-server-supervisor.pid; fi; if [ -f /tmp/nexus-labs-server-supervisor-child.pid ]; then kill $(cat /tmp/nexus-labs-server-supervisor-child.pid) 2>/dev/null || true; rm -f /tmp/nexus-labs-server-supervisor-child.pid; fi; echo Server supervisor stopped'
scripts.server:daemon:status: sh -c 'if [ -f /tmp/nexus-labs-server-supervisor.pid ] && kill -0 $(cat /tmp/nexus-labs-server-supervisor.pid) 2>/dev/null; then echo Supervisor PID: $(cat /tmp/nexus-labs-server-supervisor.pid); else echo Supervisor is not running; fi; if lsof -nP -iTCP:4000 -sTCP:LISTEN >/dev/null 2>&1; then lsof -nP -iTCP:4000 -sTCP:LISTEN; else echo Server is not listening on port 4000; fi'
scripts.server:bg:start: sh -c 'nohup npm run dev:server:nowatch > /tmp/nexus-labs-server.log 2>&1 & echo $! > /tmp/nexus-labs-server.pid && echo Server started with PID $(cat /tmp/nexus-labs-server.pid)'
scripts.server:bg:stop: sh -c 'if [ -f /tmp/nexus-labs-server.pid ]; then kill $(cat /tmp/nexus-labs-server.pid) 2>/dev/null || true; rm -f /tmp/nexus-labs-server.pid; echo Server stopped; else echo No server pid file found; fi'
scripts.server:bg:status: sh -c 'if lsof -nP -iTCP:4000 -sTCP:LISTEN >/dev/null 2>&1; then lsof -nP -iTCP:4000 -sTCP:LISTEN; else echo Server is not listening on port 4000; fi'
